meta.description: Community-maintained mining reference for Star Citizen: where every ore spawns, with what probability, and which scan signature to look for — for ship, ROC and FPS mining.

ores.title: Ores
ores.description: All mineable Star Citizen ores at a glance: rarity, mining methods, sell prices and refinery yields.

oreDetail.description: Where to find {ore} in Star Citizen: locations with spawn probability, scan signatures, sell prices and refinery yields.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Browse star systems, planets, moons and asteroid fields in Star Citizen — with all known ore occurrences per location.

system.description: Mining locations in the {system} system: planets, moons and asteroid fields with their ore occurrences.

body.description: Ore occurrences at {body} ({system}) in Star Citizen — spawn probabilities per mining method (ship, ROC, FPS).

occurrences.title: Occurrences
occurrences.description: Every known ore occurrence in Star Citizen: location, probability and mining method. Filter by system, rarity and ore.

signatures.title: Scan Signatures
signatures.description: Scan signature reference for Star Citizen mining: ship signatures per mineral plus deposit sizes for ROC and FPS mining.

compare.title: Compare Ores
compare.description: Compare Star Citizen ores side by side: prices, refinery yields and the best mining locations.

loadouts.title: Mining Loadouts
loadouts.description: Community mining loadouts for Star Citizen: lasers, modules and gadgets for Prospector, MOLE and more.

guides.title: Mining Guides
guides.description: Community-written mining guides for Star Citizen: where and how to mine, with images and video walkthroughs.

companion.title: Companion App
companion.description: STARVEIN Companion for Windows: capture Star Citizen refinery work orders via hotkey and text recognition — with countdown and a notification when the order is done.

disclaimer.text: This is an unofficial Star Citizen fansite, not affiliated with the Cloud Imperium group of companies. All content on this site not authored by its host or users are property of their respective owners.
